note: GeneralAdapter1 — the adapter Bundler3 multicall(Call[]) legs target on Ethereum mainnet. EVERY external-mutating selector triaged (I1). cover = the 10 user position legs (erc4626Deposit/Mint/Withdraw/Redeem → metamorpho; morphoSupply/SupplyCollateral/Borrow/Repay/Withdraw/WithdrawCollateral → morpho_blue), reached per-leg-to from a Bundler3 bundle. exclude = onMorpho* callbacks (reenterHash-guarded) + DEFERRED plumbing (transfers/wraps), staking (stakeEth/wrapStEth), flash-loan, MORPHO wrapper.

0x6ef5eeae.name: erc4626Deposit(address,uint256,uint256,address)
0x6ef5eeae.reason: user ERC-4626 erc4626Deposit into a MetaMorpho vault VIA Bundler3/GeneralAdapter1 → LendingAction (vault=$args.vault, asset=injected underlying). Decoded as a per-leg-to multicall child.

0x3790767d.name: erc20Transfer(address,address,uint256)
0x3790767d.reason: DEFERRED: bundle funding/plumbing leg (token/native transfer or wrap into the adapter) — the PAIRED lending leg captures the user position intent; the approve/permit grant to Bundler3 is gated separately. Token-domain transfer coverage is a follow-up.
